spec.name: Mind Bind Ring
spec.summary: anchors mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that anchors mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent.
